MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT PAUL HEMMING'S MOTION FOR ORDER SETTING ASIDE ENTRY OF DEFAULT AGAINST PAUL HEMMING AND GRANTING LEAVE TO DEFEND

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The unopposed motion to set aside default is granted for good cause shown in the moving papers. Defendant Paul Hemming shall respond to the complaint within 20 days. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/CVA)
